NETWORKZ_BOOST_BUILD_VERSION=1.74.0
NETWORKZ_EIGEN3_BUILD_VERSION=3.3.90
NETWORKZ_JEMALLOC_BUILD_VERSION=5.2.1
NETWORKZ_ZLIB_BUILD_VERSION=1.2.11

DEPENDENCIES=(
    "NETWORKZ_BOOST_URL boost-${NETWORKZ_BOOST_BUILD_VERSION}.tar.gz https://dl.bintray.com/boostorg/release/${NETWORKZ_BOOST_BUILD_VERSION}/source/boost_${NETWORKZ_BOOST_BUILD_VERSION//./_}.tar.gz"
    "NETWORKZ_EIGEN3_URL eigen-${NETWORKZ_EIGEN3_BUILD_VERSION}.tar.gz https://gitlab.com/libeigen/eigen/-/archive/${NETWORKZ_EIGEN3_BUILD_VERSION}/eigen-${NETWORKZ_EIGEN3_BUILD_VERSION}.tar.gz"
    "NETWORKZ_JEMALLOC_URL jemalloc-${NETWORKZ_JEMALLOC_BUILD_VERSION}.tar.bz2 https://github.com/jemalloc/jemalloc/releases/download/${NETWORKZ_JEMALLOC_BUILD_VERSION}/jemalloc-${NETWORKZ_JEMALLOC_BUILD_VERSION}.tar.bz2"
    "NETWORKZ_ZLIB_URL zlib-${NETWORKZ_ZLIB_BUILD_VERSION}.tar.gz https://zlib.net/fossils/zlib-${NETWORKZ_ZLIB_BUILD_VERSION}.tar.gz"
)
